contradictions.notes: The regulator material frames the issue as knowledge-and-competence criteria, and the incumbent CSSF-accredited route is published as 61h/69h rather than a universal 60h.
Guichet excludes mandatory regulated-profession training; the provider page claims co-financing eligibility. The product-level claim cannot be released.

open_issues.notes: No exhaustive language-specific competitor census was established.
Only an exam session date on 30 June 2026 was found.

open_issues.claim_text: All financial sector employees providing investment services (73K in Luxembourg).
open_issues.notes: No primary statistical source was confirmed.

open_issues.claim_text: This proposed product can issue a CSSF-accredited completion certificate.
open_issues.notes: Only the incumbent route is publicly evidenced.

open_issues.claim_text: The product can be delivered as a new independent certified route without partner/accreditation work.
open_issues.notes: The reviewed sources point to a controlled accredited ecosystem, not a free-standing new route.
